sections.name: Pre-start mechanical check
items: With ignition switch in "OFF" position, check and correct as needed:

sections.name: Safety systems
items: Check that all Safety systems are in place and operational:
Ensure the Gas Bottle is secured to the vehicle
Rollover protection (ROPS) that also protects the operator from falling objects
Label displaying the type of fuel (gasoline, diesel or propane) used
Stop lugs at the end of the lateral beam (to avoid dropping fork)

sections.name: Operational check
items: Make sure that all gauges are functioning.
After three minutes, check the level of the automatic transmission oil. (Automatic transmissions only.)
Apply the parking brake, move the lever to Reverse and check that the parking brake locks the vehicle.
Test all the controls by lifting the forks to their maximum height.
Slide forks slowly to check that locking pins drop into place and do not allow for lateral movement.
Move forklift forward and verify that brakes are operational.
Return forks to the locked position, stop the engine and apply the brakes. Inspect for hydraulic leaks.
